integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ

        simp only [norm_real, abs_prod]
        refine Finset.prod_le_prod ?_ ?_
        · intro k hk
          have : |inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)| ≤ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖ := by
            simpa [real_inner_mul_self_norm] using abs_real_inner_le_norm (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)
          exact le_trans (le_abs_self _) (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) this)
        · intro k hk
          have : 0 ≤ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖ := by
            nlinarith [norm_nonneg (X (I k).1 ω), norm_nonneg (X (I k).2 ω)]
          simpa [abs_of_nonneg this]
      exact hle
